#  Providing links to the future
We provide the networking solutions to build the infrastructure of the quantum revolution: scalable quantum computing and secure quantum information networks
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67a0a094a0e25d2c9633d53e/67d97e2240e656908892afb1__AAC4126_HD.avif) Play video 4:30 ](https://www.welinq.fr/)
What we do
## We deliver the entanglement network essential for quantum scale-out
[Modular Quantum Computing](https://www.welinq.fr/#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-0)[Quantum Communication Networks](https://www.welinq.fr/#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-1)
Building the backbone for quantum data centers
Unlocking quantum-secure networks, across any distance
Our Products
## Everything you need for quantum connectivity
At Welinq, our products are designed to overcome the greatest challenges in quantum computing and networking
### QDrive 
World-Record storage solution for quantum technology scale out.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67a0a094a0e25d2c9633d53e/67c1b77baefc279b60cc6906_quantum-memory-card-img.avif)
### Quantum   
Link
Delivering end-to-end quantum connectivity, integrating cutting-edge quantum photonics, storage solutions, and light-qubit interfaces.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67a0a094a0e25d2c9633d53e/67c1b77b14a35fe769a65cf7_quantum-link-card-img.avif)
### Software   
& Services
Advanced quantum software for optimized algorithm partitioning, distributed error-correction, and real-world use cases.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67a0a094a0e25d2c9633d53e/67c1b77b57301319014f1a0b_custom-quantum-card-img.avif)
contact our team
key benefits for
[Quantum Computing Providers](https://www.welinq.fr/#w-tabs-1-data-w-pane-0)[Data centers & HPCs](https://www.welinq.fr/#w-tabs-1-data-w-pane-1)[Large-scale Quantum Networks](https://www.welinq.fr/#w-tabs-1-data-w-pane-2)
Increase Computing Power
Scale beyond hardware limits with distributed architectures
Boost Stability
Implement distributed quantum error correction for more reliable computing
Smarter Execution
Maximize current Quantum Computers' performances using our software solutions for distributed quantum computation
Plug & Play Interconnection
Turnkey solutions for quantum computer integration
Accelerate Commercialization
Faster access to real-world quantum applications
Multi-Platform Ready
Works with photonic, superconducting, or neutral atom qubits, and more
Best-in-Class Memories
Access the most advanced quantum memories for secure data transmission
Global Scalability
Connect Quantum Computers over long distances
Reliable Quantum Storage
Store and retrieve quantum information with high fidelity, at the highest efficiency to date
Contact our team
Partners
## Empowering the next computing revolution
At the forefront of quantum networking, Welinq is uniting global leaders to shape the future of quantum computing.
